Index.title: SILA AI Recruitment
Index.description: Smart CV analysis and comparison platform using AI
Index.ai_prompt_hint: Describe the job in natural language — AI will generate a structured posting.
Index.upload_desc: Just drop the file — AI will extract name, email, and analyze against all jobs automatically. Supports PDF, TXT, DOCX, and Images.
Index.chat_empty_desc: I have access to your candidate database. Ask me to compare, summarize, or suggest next steps.
Index.chat_no_response: I couldn't process that. Try again?
Index.job_placeholder: e.g., I need a senior React developer with 5 years experience...
Index.webhook_hint: Optional: We will send candidates with 90%+ score to this URL.
Index.api_key_hint: Get a free API key from Google AI Studio
Index.balanced_desc: Balanced mode evaluates missing requirements and partial matches loosely.
Index.strict_desc: Strict mode heavily penalizes for missing required skills or years of experience.
Index.privacy_hint: Hides phone numbers and addresses from AI prompts for better privacy.
Index.threshold_hint: Triggers email alerts for candidates scoring above this.
Index.reject_hint: Moves candidates scoring below this directly to 'Rejected'.
Index.cultural_fit_desc: AI evaluation of professional values and communication alignment.
Index.project_impact_desc: Weighted score of academic projects and real-world implementation scale.
Index.delete_confirm_job: Are you sure you want to delete this job? This will also remove all associated candidate analysis for this job.
Index.delete_confirm_candidate: Are you sure you want to delete this candidate? Their CV and all application records will be permanently removed from the system.
Index.get_api_key_link: Get your API key from Google AI Studio
Index.welcome_step1: Experience the next generation of recruitment. To begin, you'll need a Gemini API Key to power our neural matching engine.
Index.welcome_step2: Configure your AI brain. Enter your API key in the settings and select a model that fits your needs.
Index.welcome_step2_detail: Efficiency: Use Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite (Fastest) or 3 Flash for rapid screening.
Index.welcome_step2_pro: Precision: Use Gemini 3.1 Pro for deep cognitive analysis (Requires Paid Tier).
Index.welcome_step3: Complete Automation. SILA will now monitor your inbox and analyze every incoming CV against your open roles automatically.
Index.error_quota_exceeded_details: Quota exceeded for {model}. Please retry after {reset}.
Index.error_download_failed: Download failed. No original CV available.
Index.whatsapp_enabled_desc: Send rapid-fire verification questions to candidates via WhatsApp.
Index.whatsapp_no_phone: No phone number found in CV

Login.subtitle: Sign in to the SILA Platform
Login.disclaimer: Continuing will grant read access to your inbox for automated CV extraction.

About.title: SILA: Cognitive Intelligence
About.subtitle: Beyond Parsing. A Revolution in HR Intelligence.
About.description: SILA (صلة): The vital link and enduring bond between ambitious talent and visionary employers. SILA isn't just a platform; it's the intellectual backbone of your recruitment strategy. Built on the frontiers of Large Language Models to transform how talent meets opportunity.
About.feature_ai_desc: Beyond simple keywords—SILA performs deep cognitive analysis, understanding context, nuance, and potential with over 95% precision.
About.feature_security_desc: Architected for absolute privacy. Your candidate data remains isolated via Supabase RLS and end-to-end encrypted sessions.
About.feature_pipeline_desc: A fluid Kanban architecture designed for high-stakes recruitment pipelines and seamless collaboration.
About.vision_desc: We believe recruitment should be deep, data-driven, and devoid of bias. SILA was born to eliminate the noise and reveal the true potential hidden in every CV.
About.developer_desc: An Electrical Engineer and Full-Stack Visionary. Mahamed bridges the gap between complex hardware logic and fluid AI software, leading the technical evolution of the SILA engine.
About.idea_desc: An Electrical Engineer and Recruitment Mastermind. Mohammed pioneered the tactical scoring methodology that forms the heart of SILA, bringing years of strategic insight into a digital brain.
